self_report.viz_verdict: Shaded-integral values at y=0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1.0 are 0.136, 0.218, 0.272, 0.297, 0.325, 0.333 — strictly increasing and topping out at 1/3, agreeing with the claim.
self_report.notes: Analytically, sqrt(x^4 + c^2) ≤ x^2 + c with c = y - y^2 gives f(y) ≤ y^2 - 2y^3/3, which is increasing on [0,1] and equals 1/3 at y=1; visualization confirms this matches the integral at y=1 exactly.
